preferredDeck: Desktop performance pass hardens Friends, feed search, and renderer recovery
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Freed Desktop now calls AppKit activation directly when restoring the main window
Startup now retries the native show path and records activation probe results
macOS launch recovery now restores regular app activation before showing the main Freed Desktop window
Freed Desktop now unminimizes and orders the main window front when reopening or recovering it
Feed cards isolate layout and paint work during scrolling
Feed priority ordering and common bulk actions avoid full render-path document work
Local snapshots prune stale binaries on startup and listing
Maintenance tasks skip full feed-state broadcasts when no records changed
Freed Desktop caps oversized article text before projecting feed state into the renderer
Feed cards render bounded text previews for long article bodies
Desktop memory pressure caps at 4 GiB before background social scraping starts
Desktop social scrapers now throttle under high memory pressure
Friends view now virtualizes overview rows and keeps dense graph interaction responsive at 1,600 connections
Desktop performance validation now covers the Friends scale path and feed scroll regressions
Feed cards now shed inline media under high memory pressure
Single-item read marks resolve after enqueueing so scroll and reader-open paths avoid durable flush waits
Friends account-link suggestions use indexed candidate matching, cutting the 1,600 connection Friends mount benchmark from about 2.1 seconds to about 1.0 second locally
Feed search shares item lookup work across mounted consumers and keeps MiniSearch relevance order instead of sorting the full hit set again
Desktop hidden renderer heartbeat logging now waits past WebKit hidden timer throttling to avoid false stale-renderer recovery noise
Friends graph now supports trackpad pinch zoom and pan gestures in the dense graph view
